response:
A business description for a Google My Business profile targeting first-time home buyers and home buyers in Orlando, Florida, can be rewritten as follows:

**Business Description:**  
Established in 2002, Paul Giles & The Vintage Team at Compass is a trusted real estate agency dedicated to providing expert guidance to homeowners and business owners throughout central Florida. Our team offers comprehensive support for both buyers and sellers, covering all aspects of real estate transactions and financing. We aim to build long-term relationships with our clients and ensure a seamless and reliable real estate experience. We serve multiple locations in Orlando, including Conway, Orlando, Maitland, Winter Park, Windermere, Altamonte Springs, Delaney Park, Lake Nona Region, and Lancaster Park. We are operated by a small team of experienced real estate professionals.
